title: Golden Globe Awards Predictions – Motion Picture: Will it be One Award After Another or Will Voters be Sentimental?
text: According to Erik Anderson's analysis, the drama race features three main contenders with distinct positioning. Hamnet has clearly been a Jessie Buckley only road for the film so far, suggesting the film's strength centers on its lead actress rather than broad support across categories. Hamnet is predicted to win Best Motion Picture Drama. Sentimental Value represents a potential upset threat. Anderson observes that Sentimental Value has the second-most noms here after OBAA, it's going home with something, possibly more than a few, indicating substantial momentum heading into the ceremony. Sinners is positioned as a spoiler prediction. While positioned as the upset pick, Anderson expresses caution about this possibility. He acknowledges the precedent of Black-led films winning drama categories, noting historical wins like Moonlight and 12 Years a Slave, but adds that Sinners isn't as strong as either of those films so I'm hesitant to say it has an easy path here. The analyst emphasizes that Globe voters, being primarily international journalists rather than industry insiders, tend toward more unpredictable selections than other awards bodies.
